cross_scene_arcs.title: From Skeptic to Survivor: Dale's Evolution in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale transitions from managing personal anxiety about flying to actively participating in survival efforts during escalating crises, culminating in her coerced but courageous involvement in an interstellar mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dale struggles with fear of flying while trying to maintain professional composure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dale is physically and emotionally committed to a dangerous space journey, relying on Flash but asserting agency under extreme duress.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her long-term survival and ability to retain autonomy in Zarkov's mission remain uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracturing and Reclamation of Dale's Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale's status shifts from captive to coerced consort, then to active resistor as she regains control through subterfuge and combat, reclaiming her role as an agent of escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dale is equalized with Flash and Zarkov as a prisoner under Ming's rule.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dale executes a high-risk rescue operation, securing keys and preparing to free Zarkov.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her disguise and plan may be exposed at any moment, threatening the entire escape effort.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dale and Flash: A Bond Forged in Separation and Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale and Flash's relationship evolves from initial tension to deep emotional interdependence, sustained across physical separation by loyalty, telepathic connection, and mutual rescue intent.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dale reveals vulnerability to Flash by admitting her fear of flying, accepting his support.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dale acts on Flash's telepathic instructions, committing to a coordinated escape plan that reaffirms their bond.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether they can reunite before Dale is permanently bound to Ming or harmed by Mongo's forces.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Resistance Against Coercion: The Forced Marriage Arc
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale faces escalating pressure to submit to Ming's forced marriage, moving from psychological breakdown to silent defiance, marking a central conflict of bodily autonomy and resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dale is designated as Ming's bride, transforming her into a political symbol under threat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dale participates in the wedding ceremony under duress, weeping but maintaining inner resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Dale will be able to escape the marriage's consequences or be permanently subsumed into Ming's regime.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Voice of Reason in a World of Tyranny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dale uses moral conviction, defiance, and dark resilience to resist Mongo's culture of violence and sexual coercion, positioning herself as a counterforce to its oppressive values.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Dale copes with trauma through dark humor and imagination after witnessing brutality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dale publicly challenges Mongo's leaders and repels Vultan's advance, asserting ethical and personal boundaries.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her voice remains isolated among hostile powers, with no guarantee her appeals for unity or dignity will lead to change.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Heroic Instinct to Reluctant Captive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash begins as a composed, responsible figure responding to crisis with authority, but is progressively stripped of control—first by supernatural forces, then by Dr. Zarkov's coercion—culminating in his forced launch into space. This arc traces his transformation from autonomous hero to unwilling participant in a mission beyond his understanding.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Flash is in control, acting as a stabilizing force during in-flight turbulence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Flash is physically overpowered and launched into space against his will, now dependent on others for survival.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Flash has no agency over the mission's purpose or destination, and his ability to reclaim control remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Deepening Bond Between Flash and Dale
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash and Dale evolve from strangers with subtle tension to deeply connected allies bound by shared trauma, mutual protection, and romantic love. Their relationship becomes a central emotional driver, influencing Flash's decisions even across physical separation and invisibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Flash and Dale share a moment of vulnerability during turbulence, initiating a fragile connection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Flash publicly declares his love and risks everything to disrupt Dale's forced wedding, affirming their bond as a revolutionary act.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite their emotional unity, they remain physically separated and under constant threat, with no guarantee of lasting reunion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Evolution of Flash as a Resistance Leader
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash transitions from a captive outsider to a galvanized leader of resistance against Ming's tyranny. Through exposure to injustice, strategic alliances, and personal courage, he gains moral authority and operational influence, ultimately orchestrating coordinated rebellion across Mongo.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Flash is a prisoner under Zarkov's coercion, with no power or knowledge of Mongo's politics.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Flash commands telepathic coordination, earns the respect of rebels, and directly challenges Ming's authority in his own hall.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Flash lacks formal power or resources, and his leadership remains fragile, dependent on unstable alliances and his own survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Cost of Transformation: Identity and Invisibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Flash's physical and existential identity is eroded through repeated trials, culminating in his complete invisibility—a literal and symbolic loss of self. His goal shifts from survival to reclaiming agency and visibility, both literally and metaphorically, in a world that can no longer see him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Flash is a visible, physically present hero capable of direct action.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Flash is fully invisible, struggling to assert his presence and identity despite being unable to be seen.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: It is unclear whether Flash can reverse his invisibility or if he will remain a ghost-like figure, acting from the shadows without recognition.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Descent into Fanaticism
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov's singular goal to confront an alleged intelligent cosmic threat evolves from scientific conviction into obsessive, unilateral action, culminating in coercive and violent measures to force others to participate in his mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov believes Earth is under intelligent attack and prepares to launch into space to retaliate.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov forcibly launches Flash and Dale into space against their will, prioritizing mission success over ethics or consent.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The legitimacy of Zarkov's mission remains ambiguous—whether he is a visionary savior or a delusional extremist driving others to their deaths.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Captor to Captive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov's status shifts dramatically from autonomous scientist and captor to powerless prisoner of Ming the Merciless, losing control over his mission and becoming a witness to the very destruction he sought to prevent.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov holds Flash and Dale at gunpoint, in full control of the mission and his environment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov is chained, paraded, and forced to witness Ming's plan to destroy Earth, stripped of agency and reduced to a moral voice without power.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Zarkov's ability to regain influence or alter the course of events remains uncertain despite his survival and moral clarity.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Moral Catalyst
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov's ethical stance and scientific idealism gradually influence key figures, transforming him from a distrusted captor into a moral authority whose words catalyze rebellion against tyranny.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov's actions have eroded trust, and his advice leads to the group's capture, damaging his credibility.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Zarkov's moral challenge prompts Vultan to defect from Ming, marking a turning point in the resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Vultan's internal conflict suggests the fragility of moral transformation in Mongo's brutal hierarchy, leaving Zarkov's long-term influence uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Cost of Scientific Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Zarkov's pursuit of advanced technology leads to a breakthrough in invisibility, but the experiment triggers an unforeseen cosmic disturbance, reigniting the central conflict on a larger scale.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov investigates unexplained physical effects on Mongo, attempting to harness alien physics for technological gain.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The successful invisibility test unleashes a new existential threat, implicating Zarkov's science in the escalation of danger.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The origin and nature of the cosmic disturbance remain unknown, raising questions about the responsibility of scientists when their experiments endanger the universe.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Collapse of Hope
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Despite temporary liberation and renewed resistance, Zarkov confronts irrefutable evidence of Earth's impending annihilation, leading to a psychological and emotional collapse that marks the end of his active resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Zarkov regains freedom and reengages in the fight against Ming, hopeful that Earth can still be saved.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Faced with scientific certainty of doom, Zarkov abandons hope and accepts Earth's destruction, emotionally defeated.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The group has no plan to stop the plasma contraction, and Zarkov's surrender leaves the fate of Earth and its defenders in limbo.
